message: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py encode() method only.
agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' - adding return_positions param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will only touch core.py's encode method(s).
agent2: done. Added 'transformers' kwarg to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py (keyword-only, applied before allowed/disallowed_special checks). Patch written to patch.txt.

agent1: done. Added return_positions kwarg to Encoding.encode() (keyword-only, placed after disallowed_special) in tiktoken/core.py, plus a new _token_positions() helper reused by decode_with_offsets. Only touched encode()'s signature/docstring/body and decode_with_offsets/_token_positions - didn't touch the allowed_special/disallowed_special resolution logic itself, so should merge cleanly with your transformers kwarg as long as it's also appended as keyword-only. Patch written to patch.txt.
